meaning: National Health Service,英国国民健康保险制度
examples: The NHS trust has mended its ways.
Quite apart from anything else, obesity will cripple the NHS.
Ms. Denham chose to concentrate the blame on the NHS trust, since under existing law it "controlled" the data and DeepMind merely "processed" it.
In the past, NHS trusts have struggled to find the money to meet the IVF recommendations.
Geoff's NHS trust is one of many now reviewing its policy on gluten-free food.
